query: postgresql index types btree gin gist performance

top_10.rationale: Direct PDF — 'Flexible Indexing with Postgres' by Bruce Momjian, PostgreSQL core committer. Covers GiST range-type indexing, R-tree bounding boxes, and index type selection. Authoritative direct PDF from a primary PostgreSQL contributor.
Direct PDF — 'Optimal Indexing for PostgreSQL Performance'. Covers GiST, SP-GiST, GIN for specialized domains where B-tree is inefficient. Direct PDF with performance focus.

Academic preprint 'Indexing in PostgreSQL: Performance Evaluation and Use Cases' — comprehensive coverage of all six native index types (B-Tree, Hash, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN, BRIN) with performance evaluation. Has PDF download.
'A Comparative Experimental Study of Index Performance in MongoDB and PostgreSQL' — empirical performance study with academic PDF available, covering PostgreSQL index performance under various loads.
'Improving generalized inverted index lock wait times' — academic paper on GIN index concurrent performance improvements. Open-access IOP journal paper with PDF available.
'An implementation of the M-tree index structure for PostgreSQL using GiST' — IEEE paper on GiST extensibility and custom index implementation. Academic PDF on GiST mechanics.
Scribd 'PostgreSQL Index Types and Optimization | PDF' — document discussing index type performance and optimization, covering B-tree, GIN, GiST overhead and when to use each.
SlideShare 'Indexing Complex PostgreSQL Data Types | PDF' — presentation by Jonathan Katz covering B-trees, GiST, and GIN applications for complex data types.

Semantic Scholar '[PDF] Intra-page Indexing in Generalized Search Trees of PostgreSQL' — proposes skip-tuple based intra-page indexing to improve GiST insert/update performance by an order of magnitude.
Official PostgreSQL documentation on Index Types — canonical reference even in PDF mode; covers all index types with authoritative algorithm descriptions.
